nasb.text: As the toes of the feet were partly of iron and partly of pottery, so some of the kingdom will be strong and part of it will be brittle.

esv.text: And as the toes of the feet were partly iron and partly clay, so the kingdom shall be partly strong and partly brittle.

cnv.text: 那些腳趾是鐵和泥混雜的，那國也必是部分堅強，部分脆弱。

ccb.text: 半铁半泥的脚趾表示那国必半强半弱。
